free_text: Emission of alpha particles in statistical multistep
at the CN Van de Graaff accelerator belonging to LNL
with the Milan AVF Cyclotron with alpha detectors.
Surface barrier Si detectors just thick enough
to stop the most energetic alpha particles (300-400 mu)
The thickness of the 27Al target was about 100 mu,
which gave rise to an energy spread of about 20 keV in
Cross section averaged over 4 MeV of the 3He incident
